title: Create NAFNet ONNX export script
description: Create Python script scripts/export_nafnet.py to convert NAFNet PyTorch weights to ONNX format. Include requirements.txt with dependencies (torch, basicsr, onnx, onnxsim, onnxconverter-common). Script should export with dynamic axes for height/width, support FP16 conversion flag, and output SHA256 hash for verification.
notes: Created scripts/export_nafnet.py with full export pipeline, scripts/requirements.txt with dependencies, made script executable

title: Extend DenoiseModal with AI/Classic toggle
description: Extend the existing DenoiseModal component with a Classic/AI toggle. Add ApplyAiDenoising to Invokes enum. Update DenoiseModalState to include mode ('classic' | 'ai'). Update handleApplyDenoise to branch on mode and call appropriate backend command. Add styled toggle switch matching SettingsPanel design. Show model download size warning when AI mode selected.

title: Add apply_ai_denoising Tauri command
description: Add apply_ai_denoising Tauri command in main.rs that calls ai_denoising::denoise_image_ai(). Add nafnet_session and nafnet_init_lock to AppState. Use tokio::task::spawn_blocking for the heavy inference work. Store result in existing denoise_result field. Reuse save_denoised_image logic. Register command in invoke_handler.

title: Implement tiled inference engine in ai_denoising.rs
description: Implement tiled image processing for NAFNet inference. Add TileConfig constants (512px tiles, 64px overlap, 16px padding multiple), generate_tile_coords() function to split image with overlaps, process_tile() for ONNX inference on single tiles, and blend_tiles() using linear feathering weights. Main denoise_image_ai() entry point loads image, processes tiles sequentially with progress events, blends results, and applies intensity-based blending with original.

title: Export NAFNet-width64-SIDD to ONNX and upload to GitHub Releases
description: Run the export script to generate nafnet-sidd-width64.onnx, create a GitHub Release on SilentKnightOwl/RapidRAW, and upload the model file as a release asset. Record the direct download URL and SHA256 hash for use in the Rust backend.

title: Testing and quality validation for AI denoise
description: Write Rust unit tests for tile generation, blending weights, and padding logic. Test integration with JPEG, PNG, and RAW files. Verify no seam artifacts on 45MP+ images. Compare output quality with BM3D. Performance test 24MP image on CUDA vs CPU. Test model download flow and progress events. Validate intensity slider behavior (0=original, 1.0=full denoise).

title: Create ai_denoising.rs - model download and session management
description: Create new src-tauri/src/ai_denoising.rs module with NAFNet model constants (URL, filename, SHA256), session struct, and get_or_init_nafnet_session() function. Implement lazy initialization with double-checked locking, download on demand from GitHub Releases, SHA256 verification, and ORT session creation with CUDA + CPU fallback execution providers. Emit denoise-progress events during download.
